menuItems.name: Sarawak Laksa
menuItems.description: Our signature creamy laksa broth with sambal belacan, coconut milk, egg and chicken. Add extra gravy for RM5 per portion.

menuItems.name: Kolo Mee
menuItems.description: Springy egg noodles tossed in shallot oil, served with soup on the side. Choose your topping.

menuItems.name: Belacan Beehoon
menuItems.description: Vermicelli noodles stir-fried with pungent sambal belacan. Add a whole telor padi (century egg) on the side for RM4.5.

menuItems.name: Tomato Crispy Mee
menuItems.description: Crispy noodles in a rich tomato seafood gravy, topped with prawns and squid. A popular Sarawak favourite.

menuItems.name: Mee Jawa Sarawak
menuItems.description: Yellow noodles in a thick, rich gravy made from sweet potato and stock, topped with tofu puffs, half egg and fried shallots.

menuItems.name: Kacangma
menuItems.description: Traditional Hakka chicken cooked with ginger and motherwort herb. Earthy, aromatic, and best enjoyed with white rice.

menuItems.name: Oyster Omelette
menuItems.description: Classic Teochew-style oyster omelette — crispy edges, eggy centre, fresh oysters.

menuItems.name: Teh C Peng Special (Gula Apong)
menuItems.description: SALTed's signature three-layer iced tea with evaporated milk and Sarawak palm sugar (Gula Apong). Best seller.

menuItems.name: Teh C Peng Special (Pandan)
menuItems.description: Our three-layer iced tea with evaporated milk and fragrant pandan. Best seller.

menuItems.name: 7-Up
menuItems.description: Chilled lemon-lime soda.

menuItems.name: 100 Plus
menuItems.description: Refreshing isotonic sparkling drink.

menuItems.name: Ribena
menuItems.description: Sweet iced blackcurrant cordial.

menuItems.name: Ribena 7-Up
menuItems.description: Blackcurrant cordial topped with fizzy 7-Up.

menuItems.name: Rose Bandung
menuItems.description: Sweet rose syrup with milk — a Malaysian classic.

menuItems.name: Lemonade
menuItems.description: Zesty homemade iced lemonade.

menuItems.name: Sky Juice (Coway)
menuItems.description: Filtered drinking water.

menuItems.name: Mocha
menuItems.description: Rich coffee blended with chocolate. Available hot or iced.

menuItems.name: Cappuccino
menuItems.description: Espresso with steamed milk and foam. Available hot or iced.

menuItems.name: Choc-O-Cino
menuItems.description: Creamy chocolate drink. Available hot or iced.

menuItems.name: Milo
menuItems.description: Malaysia's favourite malt chocolate drink. Available hot or iced.

menuItems.name: Teh Tarik
menuItems.description: Pulled milk tea, frothy and sweet. Available hot or iced.

menuItems.name: Black Coffee
menuItems.description: Local kopi O. Available hot or iced.

menuItems.name: Black Tea
menuItems.description: Local teh O. Available hot or iced.

menuItems.name: White Coffee
menuItems.description: Smooth Ipoh-style white coffee. Available hot or iced.
